title: helichrysum newii
intro: Helichrysum newii, also known as the elephant's foot or mountain helichrysum, is a perennial plant in the sunflower family that is native to South Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects due to its high concentration of sesquiterpenes and flavonoids. The health benefits of Helichrysum newii include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and relieving pain, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. The plant is often used to make herbal preparations such as essential oils, tinctures, and infusions, which can be applied topically or taken internally to harness its medicinal properties.
